title: Expressions should not be too complex
description: Expressions should not be too complexAnalyze your codeadaptability-focusedmaintainabilityCode Smellbrain-overloadWhy is this an issue?The complexity of an expression is defined by the number of&&,||andcondition ? ifTrue : ifFalseoperators it contains.A single expression’s complexity should not become too high to keep the code readable.Noncompliant code exampleWith the default threshold value 3.if (((condition1 && condition2) || (condition3 && condition4)) && condition5) { ... }Compliant solutionif ((myFirstCondition() || mySecondCondition()) && myLastCondition()) { ... }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource S
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
// Complex ternary with nested conditions
int result = (a > b && c < d) ? ((x == y || z != w) ? value1 : value2) : ((p && q) || r ? value3 : value4);

checks.message: Expressions should not be too complex - expression complexity exceeds acceptable threshold
